metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Bernardo Rubin

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: PR review with parallel agents, confidence-based filtering, incremental tracking, and file output. General-purpose, optimized for TypeScript/JavaScript.

plugins.name: br-tools
plugins.description: Bernardo's personal toolkit: git workflow shortcuts, PR helpers, Claude meta commands, and integrations (Slack, Jira). Includes 8 slash commands and the prd-to-jira skill.
